basic_details.job_title: NIAB Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official NIAB website. The last date to submit the application form is 25-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Life sciences, Four years Bachelor degree in life sciences in Professional course
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Life sciences, including the integrated PG degrees OR Four years Bachelor degree in life sciences in Professional course. Experience in large/small animal handling, and ovarian biology will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIAB Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIAB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIAB Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NIAB Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) position is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Life sciences or a Four years Bachelor degree in life sciences in a Professional course.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56000 per month, plus 30% HRA if applicable.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the NIAB Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening, followed by an online interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online through the official NIAB website.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIAB located?
faq.answer: NIAB is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500032.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any preferred qualifications or experience?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in large/small animal handling and ovarian biology will be preferred for this role.
